name:
Showcase: Rich HTTP exchange panels for browser network responses.
   These tests demonstrate that the same rich HTML panel works for
   browser-level network calls (page/wait-for-response, page/on-response),
   not just API testing calls. > browser network responses with exchange panels > JSON API call from browser — capture XHR-style response

descriptionHtml: Navigates to a page, then captures a subsequent JSON API response. Uses page/wait-for-response with page/evaluate to make a fetch() call from the browser and capture the network response with full details. The panel shows the JSON response with syntax highlighting.
